transition_band.formula: EUR 24,500 + 45% of taxable income above EUR 175,000
transition_band.note: Statutory transition band between the 14% and 16% brackets; simplified in this estimator as <=175k -> 14%, >175k -> 16%.

cit.basis: Corporate income tax (impot sur le revenu des collectivites, IRC) cut from 17% to 16% as of tax year 2025; 14% on taxable income up to EUR 175,000.
cit.note: The calculator returns only the state CIT (IRC). The 7% solidarity surtax (on the CIT amount) and the municipal business tax (~6.75% in Luxembourg City) bring the aggregate effective rate to ~23.87% in Luxembourg City for 2025.

vat.note: 17% standard VAT rate is the lowest in the EU; reduced rates of 14%, 8% and 3% apply. EU One-Stop-Shop (OSS) available for cross-border B2C supplies.

pillar_two.note: Luxembourg has transposed the EU Pillar Two Directive (Law of 22 December 2023): IIR/QDMTT from 2024 and UTPR from 2025 apply a 15% global minimum tax to groups with consolidated revenue >= EUR 750m. Out of scope for this SME estimator.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
The 175k-200k001 transition band, solidarity surtax, municipal business tax, net wealth tax, participation exemption and treaty relief may alter outcomes.
Verify against official ACD guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
